title: Monetdb Python UDF crashes because of null aggr_group_arr
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_data (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, value INT, name VARCHAR(50), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION python_avg(value FLOAT[]) RETURNS FLOAT AS $$ SELECT COALESCE(AVG(val), 0) FROM unnest(value) AS val;
SELECT python_avg(ARRAY(SELECT value FROM test_data WHERE value IS NOT NULL)) AS average_value;
SELECT * FROM test_data WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_data WHERE value IS NULL);
